project.name: AI漫剧工业化生产中心
project.styleDefinitionBrief: 暗色调创意工作室风，深炭灰底色配赤陶橙暖色点缀，编辑式排版层级，高信息密度，兼顾创作灵感与结构化生产流程，像创意机构的内部工具
project.designRead: Production platform / creative teams / dark editorial studio / high density / avoid generic SaaS blue dashboard

colorSystem.primaryColorRole: warm terracotta #E8743C used for primary CTA, active nav, progress indicators, and key metrics highlight
colorSystem.brandHuePolicy: single warm terracotta hue only; no secondary/accent brand hue; identities/categories use neutral tints or primary tint

styleContinuityAnchors.shapeSystem: restrained radius: 4px inputs/tags, 8px cards/buttons, 12px panels/modals, 9999px pills/avatars; no radius above 12px
styleContinuityAnchors.typographySystem: Inter + Noto Sans SC for display and body; JetBrains Mono for metrics/data; strong weight contrast 400-800; editorial section numbers in mono primary color
styleContinuityAnchors.spacingSystem: 4/8/12/16/24/32/48px scale; dense 12-16px card padding; 24px section gaps; tight 8px toolbar gaps
styleContinuityAnchors.componentLanguage: border-led surfaces on dark bg; subtle 1px borders #2A2A36; surface layering #16161D→#1D1D26→#24242F; no static shadows; floating layers use shadow-floating
styleContinuityAnchors.surfaceAndDepth: static cards/tables/sections use border + surface layering only; shadow alpha ≤ 0.05 for static; floating layers (modal/popover/dropdown/drawer) use --acpc-shadow-floating
styleContinuityAnchors.imageryAndIconography: minimal imagery; dark editorial comic-style visuals for hero and thumbnails; inline SVG icons with 1.5px stroke; monospace for data/metrics
styleContinuityAnchors.interactionTone: minimal motion; hover/active state feedback via surface-3 background and border-light; no decorative animations; professional tool feel

sharedProjectShellContract.navigationShell: fixed left sidebar 220px with logo, 5 nav items (总览/项目/流水线/工作台/素材库), user profile at bottom; top bar 48px with breadcrumb, search, notifications, quick actions
sharedProjectShellContract.primaryColorSystem: single warm terracotta #E8743C; active nav item uses primary-tint bg + primary text; primary CTA uses solid primary bg
sharedProjectShellContract.typographySystem: Inter + Noto Sans SC; display 700-800 for headings, 400-500 for body; 11px uppercase labels with 0.04em letter-spacing; mono for metrics
sharedProjectShellContract.radiusScale: 4px sm / 8px md / 12px lg / 9999px full; cards 8px, buttons 8px, inputs 4px, panels 12px
sharedProjectShellContract.surfaceDepthModel: bg #0D0D11, surface #16161D, surface-2 #1D1D26, surface-3 #24242F; borders #2A2A36; static surfaces border-led, floating layers use shadow-floating
sharedProjectShellContract.ctaStyle: primary CTA: solid #E8743C bg, white text, 8px radius, 32px height, Inter 500 13px; secondary CTA: surface-2 bg, border, text color; ghost: transparent, text-secondary hover text
sharedProjectShellContract.alignmentRules: 12-column grid in content area; 24px page padding; 16px card padding; 8px toolbar element gaps; all rows left-aligned unless centered metrics

privateRegions: prompt input panel with model selector
preview output area with comic panels

designSource.designDecisionSummary: Dark editorial creative studio: deep charcoal #0D0D11 bg, warm terracotta #E8743C primary, Inter+Noto Sans SC typography, high information density, border-led surfaces, restrained radius 4/8/12px

productContext.productType: AI comic drama industrial production platform

pages.title: 总览看板
pages.businessScenario: 生产总览看板，展示整体生产KPI、流水线状态、最近活动和生产趋势
pages.visualNorthStar: 深色仪表盘首屏：顶部4个KPI指标卡，中间生产流水线进度可视化，右侧活动流，底部趋势图表，编辑式分区编号
pages.compositionPattern: editorial dashboard grid — 12-column layout with KPI row, split main+aside, full-width chart footer
continuityAnchors: sidebar nav with primary active state
section number labels in mono primary
border-led metric cards on surface
top bar breadcrumb rhythm
qualityRisks: dense first screen with 4 KPI cards + pipeline + feed + chart
dark theme contrast for data readability

pages.title: 项目管理
pages.businessScenario: 漫剧项目管理，展示所有项目卡片列表，支持筛选、搜索和批量操作
pages.visualNorthStar: 深色项目网格页：顶部筛选工具栏，3列项目卡片网格带缩略图，每卡显示进度条和状态标签，底部批量操作栏
pages.compositionPattern: filter bar + card grid — toolbar row with filters, 3-column responsive grid, batch action footer
continuityAnchors: sidebar nav with primary active state
section number labels in mono primary
border-led project cards on surface
top bar breadcrumb rhythm

pages.title: 生产流水线
pages.businessScenario: 生产流水线看板，以看板形式展示剧本→角色→场景→分镜→审核→发布的全流程
pages.visualNorthStar: 深色看板视图：6列流水线看板（剧本/角色/场景/分镜/审核/发布），每列含阶段卡片和进度，顶部瓶颈预警条
pages.compositionPattern: kanban board — 6 horizontal columns with scrollable card stacks, bottleneck alert bar on top
continuityAnchors: sidebar nav with primary active state
section number labels in mono primary
border-led kanban cards on surface
top bar breadcrumb rhythm

pages.title: AI创作工作台
pages.businessScenario: AI创作工作台，左侧提示词输入和模型选择，中间预览输出区，右侧生成参数和历史版本
pages.visualNorthStar: 深色三栏创作工作台：左侧提示词面板+模型选择，中间大幅预览画布显示生成的漫剧分镜，右侧参数调节+版本历史
pages.compositionPattern: three-panel workspace — left input panel, center preview canvas, right parameters sidebar
continuityAnchors: sidebar nav with primary active state
section number labels in mono primary
border-led panels on surface
top bar breadcrumb rhythm
qualityRisks: three-panel responsive collapse on smaller screens

pages.title: 素材资产库
pages.businessScenario: 素材资产库，分类浏览可复用的角色、场景、风格和背景素材，支持搜索和详情预览
pages.visualNorthStar: 深色资产库页：左侧分类树（角色/场景/风格/背景），右侧4列素材网格带缩略图，顶部搜索栏和统计
pages.compositionPattern: category sidebar + asset grid — left filter tree, 4-column thumbnail grid, search bar on top
continuityAnchors: sidebar nav with primary active state
section number labels in mono primary
border-led asset cards on surface
top bar breadcrumb rhythm
qualityRisks: category tree vs content area balance
